mapper.select: SELECT id, name, price, description, status, create_time, update_time FROM product ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT id, name, price, description, status, create_time, update_time FROM product WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (name, price, description, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{price}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET name = #{name}, price = #{price}, description = #{description}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, price, description, status, create_time, update_time FROM product WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND status = 1 ORDER BY update_time DESC
